Today.allCaughtUpHint: No transactions need your attention right now.
Today.insightsHint: Where the money went this month

Import.title: Sync
Import.heading: Import from sheet
Import.sourceMissing: Not configured — set MARCIO_LOCAL_XLSX or GOOGLE_SHEET_ID.
Import.help: Imports every month tab found in the workbook. Existing items are updated by their natural key; rows you removed from the sheet are kept here so previously matched transactions still resolve.

Month.noData: No data for this month yet — run an import.

ItemDetail.matchedTitle: {n, plural, =0 {No matched transactions} one {# matched transaction} other {# matched transactions}}

Account.empty: No transactions yet — upload a CSV.

Inbox.title: Inbox
Inbox.heading: Needs categorizing
Inbox.emptyHint: When something new from the bank doesn't auto-match, it shows up here.
Inbox.noBudgetItems: No budget items yet — import the sheet first.
Inbox.bulkMixedScopes: Bulk assign needs all selected items on the same account.

Buckets.title: Buckets
Buckets.heading: Monthly contributions
Buckets.monthlyHint: {count, plural, one {# bucket} other {# buckets}} to track.
Buckets.noAccounts: No buckets registered yet. Each bucket maps to one savings account.
Buckets.untaggedHint: Link these to a bucket in Settings → Savings so Marcio can track contributions.

Insights.title: Insights
Insights.heading: Where the money went
Insights.emptyHint: Nothing yet — categorize a few transactions in Caixa.

Settings.title: Settings
Settings.heading: Configuration

savings.title: Savings accounts
savings.hint: Define which savings accounts you use
savings.about: Each bucket maps to one real savings account (e.g. Oranje Spaarrekening V12602730). Link multiple sheet items to the same bucket — Marcio aggregates contributions at the account level.
savings.refHint: Unique text that appears in the transfer description (e.g. 'Oranje spaarrekening V12602730 Taxes').
savings.linkedItemsHint: Tap to toggle. Only SAZONAIS items for the chosen owner are listed.
savings.linkedCount: {n, plural, one {# linked item} other {# linked items}}
savings.noCandidates: No SAZONAIS items in this month — import the sheet first.
savings.notesPlaceholder: e.g. monthly deposits for annual taxes

Settings.paydayHelp: Today the rollover is on day {day}. Change it if your payday moves.
Settings.paydayInvalid: Pick a whole number between 1 and 28.

Connections.title: Connections
Connections.heading: Banks & accounts
Connections.uploadHint: Export the CSV from Mijn ING and drop it here. Re-uploads of overlapping periods are deduplicated automatically.
Connections.noAccounts: No accounts yet — upload a CSV to get started.
Connections.footnote: Nothing leaves the server: the CSV is processed and discarded, only transactions are kept in the database.

csvHelp.step2: Pick the account whose transactions you want to download.
csvHelp.step3: Click "Transacties" then the download icon (down arrow).
csvHelp.step4: Choose the date range (90 days is a good default) and CSV format.
csvHelp.step5: Confirm — the file will be named NL_[account]_[date].csv.
csvHelp.appStep1: Open the ING app and pick the account.
csvHelp.appStep3: Choose "Download statements" → CSV → date range → send/save.
csvHelp.tip: Tip: after the first upload, repeat weekly with short ranges. Marcio dedupes by (date, amount, description).

SignIn.title: Sign in
SignIn.heading: Welcome back
SignIn.errorGeneric: Could not send the link. Try again.
SignIn.errorNotAllowed: If your email is on the household list, the link is on its way.
SignIn.verifyBody: Hold tight — we're verifying your link.
SignIn.verifyError: This link is invalid or expired.

Tikkie.title: Tikkie
Tikkie.heading: By person
Tikkie.hint: Splits and reimbursements via Tikkie this month, grouped by who's on the other side.
